went_well: The six audio-backed narration IDs were dry-run individually, each emitting its exact locked Korean text and planned WAV output without credentials or network access.
The runtime source containing the narration timing and lazy Canvas battle-background changes passed JavaScript syntax checking.
went_wrong: The narrow verification used dry-runs and syntax checking; it did not render the Canvas battle background or generate/deploy audio.

metrics.name: narration_dry_runs
metrics.method: Six individual commands: python3 scripts/generate_game_audio.py gemini-narration --narration-id <intro|cinder-span|veil-citadel|echo-throne|victory|defeat> --output /tmp/narr-<id>.wav --dry-run; each exited 0 and emitted the matching locked text, WAV path, and format.

metrics.name: runtime_syntax_checks
metrics.method: node --check app.js — exit 0 with no output.

improvement_actions.action: Before the next UI integration release, capture a browser evidence packet that observes all six narration scenes and verifies the lazy battle background starts only in battle without competing with the Canvas loop.
